The "'''Tripods'''," as they were dubbed by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of three-legged, triocular beings with sac-like bodies. They had long yellow fur around their hips and tentacles, as well as shadings of pink and turquoise. They were indigenous to an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], on the route from [[Pzob/Legends|Pzob]] to [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]]. A number of them were taken prisoner aboard the ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]'', though they were able to resist being brainwashed by [[Imperial Agent|Imperial agents]].

Their needs were taken care of by a gentle [[Talz/Legends|Talz]]. The [[Protocol droid/Legends|Protocol]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and Luke Skywalker were unable to identify their species by proper name. Primitive beings not familiar with [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] civilization, they referred to themselves simply as "the '''People'''" and their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] as "the [[World (tripod home world)|World]]."
